headline: Nvidia expands AI platform with new CPU and PC offerings, shares jump
summary: Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ:NVDA, XETRA:NVD)’s latest announcements at its GTC Taipei event have reinforced the company's position in artificial intelligence infrastructure while expanding its reach into new computing markets, according to Bank of America, which maintained a 'Buy' rating and $350 price...

headline: BofA Lifts Price Target on Air Products (APD) After Earnings Beat
summary: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD) ranks among the top hydrogen stocks to buy now. On May 1, BofA Securities boosted Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE:APD)’s price target to $305 from $303, retaining a Neutral rating on the company’s shares. The company announced second-quarter EPS of $3.20, which exceeded BofA’s expectation of $3.04. headline: JPMorgan's Bullish Q2 Outlook Highlights Fee Income Potential
summary: JPM's Q2 2026 fee income will likely surge, driven by a likely rise of 11% in markets revenue and 10% jump in IB fees, fueled by volatility and deal-making.

headline: Regulators Didn’t Speak to US Fund at Heart of Segantii Trial

headline: Investor repositioning drives shift in Asia quant markets, BofA Securities conference shows
summary: A shift is underway in Asia's quant markets, driven by rising allocator interest, higher trading volumes and technology adoption, discussions at BofA Securities' Asia Pacific Integrated Quant Services Senior Leadership Conference on May 20, 2026, in Hong Kong highlighted.

headline: BofA Securities Asia Forum Gathers Global Investors Amid Surge in Hedge Funds Allocations
summary: BofA Securities hosted its fourth annual Asia Alternatives Forum on Thursday, May 21, 2026, in Hong Kong. The event brought together more than 20 global and Asia-based hedge fund managers and 120 institutional allocators, representing approximately $700 billion allocated to hedge funds.
